deadline.description: unix timestamp in seconds that controls how long the signed key request is valid for. (24 hours from now is recommended)

redirect_url.description:
Url to redirect to after the signer is approved.
**Note** : This should only be used when requesting a signer from a native mobile application.

signature.description: Signature generated by the custody address of the app. Signed data includes app_fid, deadline, 32 bytes padded auth address. [Refer guide for more details.](https://docs.neynar.com/docs/auth-address-signature-generation)
